data.title: Unit 1A: Friends - Lesson 1: What do you look like?
data.desc:
Adj to describe overall appearance: tall, short, thin, overweight, young, old
- What do you look like? - I'm tall.

data.title: Unit 1A: Friends - Lesson 2: He's handsome.
data.desc:
- review 
 - Adj to describe overall appearance (cont): handsome, pretty, cute, sporty
Review: 
- What do you look like? - I'm tall.
New structure: 
- What does he/she look like? - He's handsome.

data.title: Unit 1A: Friends - Lesson 3: Is she shy?
data.desc:
- Review words in L2
Review: 
- What does he/she look like? - He's handsome. 
New structure: 
- Is he/she shy? Yes, he is/she is. // No, he isn't/she isn't.

data.title: Unit 1A: Friends - Lesson 4: Why do you like him?
data.desc:
- Review L3 vocab
- Is he/she shy? Yes, he is/she is. // No, he isn't/she isn't.
New structure: 
- Why do you like him/her? - Because she's kind and clever.

data.title: Unit 1A: Friends - Lesson 5: I like her because she's kind and clever.
data.desc:
- Review 
Adj to describe overall appearance: tall, short, thin, overweight, young, old, handsome, pretty, cute, sporty
Adj to describe personalities: kind, clever, shy, friendly, hard-working

data.title: Unit 2A: Jobs - Lesson 1: What do you do?
data.desc:
- Jobs: office worker, famer, driver, nurse, cook
- What do you do? I'm a farmer.
- What does your mother/father do? She's /He's a cook.

data.title: Unit 4A: Around the world - Lesson 1: Where are you from?
data.desc:
- Countries: Vietnam, China, Japan, Canada, England
- Where are you from? - I'm from Vietnam. 
 - Where is he from? - He's from Japan.
 - Where are they from? - They're from England.

data.title: Unit 4A: Around the world - Lesson 2: Where do you live?
data.desc:
- Review words learned in L1
- Countries (cont): France, Australia, America
- Physical features: city, countryside
Review: 
- Where are you from? - I'm from Vietnam. 
- Where is he from? - He's from A

data.title: Unit 4A: Around the world - Lesson 3: There are some mountains in Vietnam.
data.desc:

- Physical features: city, countryside (review); mountain, river, beach, bridge

data.title: Unit 4A: Around the world - Lesson 4: There aren't any deserts in Vietnam.
data.desc:
- Review words learned in L3
- Physical features: island, rainforest, safari park, desert
Review: 
- There are some __________ in Vietnam/ China,...
- There aren't any __________  in Vietnam/ China,..
